name: Conquer The Heroine #1: Knightess Yvaine
description:
You’re a wanted thief with a massive bounty on your head. You’re known for going to different kingdoms and managing to rob massive amounts of treasure from within each kingdom’s castle coffers.

You’ve just had another successful operation, when suddenly, a knight stands in your way. She proclaims herself as Yvaine, the knight who will bring you to justice, and claim glory for her kingdom.
creator: Liz Miyazaki
